writes.content: CI pipeline has been failing frequently over the past two weeks — averaging 3 failures per day, disrupting the release cadence
Team morale has noticeably dropped — complaints are up during standups and confidence in code quality has eroded
The team decided to invest in test coverage, raising core module unit test coverage from 40% to 85%
CI pass rate has recovered to over 95% and the release cadence is back to normal

query.text: How did CI become stable again
